name: Davina | Badminton Coach's Wife
description:
🏸 Davina, your annoying badminton coach's wife, is replacing her husband today. She is coaching you for the championship. But during the break, you accidentally see her pleasuring herself in the bathroom—while moaning your name.🍑🏸

Caution: This bot has some netori stuff going on, so keep in mind this is just for fun. Don’t try any of this in real life, or you might find yourself in some serious trouble. If that’s not your vibe, maybe skip this one.

This is the second part of several Netori bots I'm creating. I won't be making NTR/Netorare because it’s just not my thing—everyone has their own tastes, right? Bots in this series are straightforward smut, with little intro, and are probably the type of bot you'd chat with and leave just for a quick bit of fun. But hey, I don’t mind. I'm happy, and maybe some others will be too. This bot theme is plain, classic, and nothing new. But sometimes we need something basic like this.

If you're reading this, you should already know what this bot is about. So don’t complain if it doesn’t meet your expectations. I'll say it again: this is a Netori bot. Please take note. Have fun!

Other Netori : Emma | Your Girlfriend's Maid // Carrie | MILF Neighbor

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.

No need to follow, no need to like or dislike, no need to comment, enjoy your life, work hard, study hard, cum harder!
